headline: RTX RAIVEN Flight Test Adds New Angle To Defense Growth Story
summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, completed the first flight test of its RAIVEN Staring system, a next generation situational awareness technology. The test marks a key step in advancing RTX's RAIVEN product family, which is designed to be scalable and platform agnostic. This development adds an additional data point to RTX's defense portfolio beyond recent focus on earnings, guidance, and partnerships. For investors tracking RTX (NYSE:RTX), the successful RAIVEN Staring system flight test...
